title: alchemilla vulgaris var. tenuis
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. tenuis, also known as lady's mantle, is a perennial plant species in the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential in treating various health issues. The health benefits of lady's mantle include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of lady's mantle can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat female reproductive issues, as well as to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
